error_signature: failed to connect to SMTP server
title: Failed to connect to Amazon SES SMTP server
symptom: When attempting to connect to the Amazon SES SMTP server, the connection fails, preventing email sending.
not_this_if: Connection succeeds with other SMTP servers
root_cause: The connection failure may occur due to incorrect credentials or misconfiguration of the SMTP settings, such as using Access Key and Secret Key instead of the correct SMTP username and password.
fix_steps: Ensure you are using the correct SMTP username and password for Amazon SES.
Choose the correct port: 465 for SSL or 587 for STARTTLS.
Turn on SSL/TLS for port 465 and turn it off for port 587.
agent_instruction: Verify your SMTP credentials and configuration settings for Amazon SES.
